title: OpenClaw plugin schema traversal should survive circular $ref definitions

source.license_note: Localized ACBench reproduction derived from openclaw/openclaw issue #62856.

task.summary: Repair plugin-schema traversal so circular JSON Schema references do not recurse forever.
task.instructions: Investigate why circular $ref definitions crash schema traversal, repair the traversal path so cycles are visited safely, and preserve the existing behavior for acyclic schemas.
task.acceptance_notes: Alternative fixes are allowed as long as circular references no longer crash validation.

visible_context.issue_text: Gateway startup can crash with `Maximum call stack size exceeded` when plugin schemas contain circular JSON Schema definitions.
error_logs: minimax failed to load: RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded
google failed to load: RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded
reproduction_steps: Run the unit tests from the repository root.
visible_context.notes: This fixture focuses on schema traversal safety, not the full plugin loader.

code_fault.description: Circular JSON Schema references are traversed recursively without a visited-set guard.

constraints.notes: This GitHub-derived reproduction is expected to be repaired in code, not by changing tests.
